policies.legacy-rewrite-every-step: Replace prior messages with a deterministic durable-state summary after every completed step.
policies.high-water-stable-prefix: Append messages byte-stably until the next projected chunk would cross 75000 input tokens, then replace prior messages with a deterministic durable-state summary.

methodology.compactionSummary: Oracle-generated from scenario ground truth; no summary-model call was made or timed.

scenarios.file-search: Search exported symbols across 239 non-test TypeScript files under packages/runtime/src, approximately 810000 source characters.
scenarios.conversation: Recover the latest explicitly confirmed fact from long noisy conversation blocks with superseding decisions.
scenarios.deep-research: Resolve conflicting sources using primary, active, and recency rules across large distractor corpora.

comparableAggregate.scope: MiniMax M2.7, Ministral 14B, and GLM-4.7; Llama Scout excluded because the route failed 29 of 36 logical turns.

fullCoverageProviderTokenControl.scope: Ministral 14B and GLM-4.7 only; all 30 warm logical turns per policy reported both input and cached tokens.

routeIncident.interpretation: Treat as route availability evidence, not a model-quality or context-window comparison.
